Please visit us at
https://bluebottlecoffee.com for brew
guides, exclusive merchandise, and
delicious coffee.

"At Blue Bottle coffee, we want you to be
happy. Our goal is to provide our guests
with impeccable service, and delicious
coffee and food. If you are dissatisfied with
your Blue Bottle purchase, please let us
know.

For a refund on merchandise purchased in
our cafes, we ask that you return the item
to the cafe where it was purchased in new
condition, with a receipt, and within 30
days. We are happy to offer exchanges or
store credit if an item is returned at a
different store location.

If you purchased your merchandise online,
please email
support@bluebottlecoffee.com to learn
about online returns.
